title: Software Engineer
description: Designs, develops, and maintains software applications and systems. Focuses on coding, debugging, and software architecture.
career_growth: High (Strong demand for full-stack, backend, and frontend developers with path to Tech Lead and Architect roles)

title: AI/ML Engineer
description: Builds and deploys machine learning and deep learning models to automate tasks and solve complex analytical problems.
career_growth: Exponential (Explosive growth driven by AI advancements, leading to research and leadership roles)
required_certifications: Google Cloud Professional Machine Learning Engineer

title: Data Analyst
description: Collects, processes, and performs statistical analyses on large datasets to help businesses make informed decisions.
career_growth: Steady (Essential role across all industries; paths to Senior Data Analyst and Data Scientist)
required_certifications: Microsoft Certified: Power BI Data Analyst Associate

title: Defence Officer
description: Serves in the military forces (Army, Navy, Air Force) providing leadership, strategic planning, and security operations.
career_growth: High (Structured promotions through military ranks up to General officer levels with high prestige)

title: Police Officer
description: Maintains law and order, protects the public, investigates crimes, and ensures traffic safety and legal compliance.
career_growth: Steady (Structured career path from Sub-Inspector/Assistant Commissioner to Superintendent of Police)

title: Operations Manager
description: Oversees the production of goods and/or provision of services. Ensures resources are utilized efficiently.
career_growth: High (Critical for manufacturing, logistics, and tech companies; path to Chief Operating Officer)

title: Civil Services
description: Administers government policies, manages public administration departments, and implements socio-economic development plans.
career_growth: Prestige-heavy (Structured rank growth up to Cabinet Secretary with high societal impact)

title: HR Executive
description: Manages employee recruitment, relations, training, and policy administration within an organization.
career_growth: Steady (Transition to HR Manager, Director of HR, and Chief Human Resources Officer)

title: NGO Manager
description: Directs activities of non-profit organizations, including fundraising, program coordination, and community outreach.
career_growth: Rewarding (Path to Executive Director of international NGOs or United Nations departments)

title: Public Relations Officer
description: Manages the public image and communications of a company, organization, or public figure.
career_growth: High (Crucial role in digital brand management; paths to Corporate Communications Director)

title: Social Worker
description: Helps individuals, families, and communities solve and cope with problems in their everyday lives.
career_growth: Steady (Growth within governmental social welfare wings, hospital boards, and NGOs)

title: Business Analyst
description: Bridges the gap between IT and the business using data analytics to assess processes and deliver data-driven recommendations.
career_growth: High (Path to Product Manager, Management Consultant, or Director of Business Operations)

title: Product Manager
description: Guides the cross-functional development of a product from conception to launch. Coordinates design, engineering, and marketing.
career_growth: Very High (Highly coveted position; path to Director of Product, VP of Product, and CEO)

title: Entrepreneur
description: Launches and runs a new business venture. Takes on financial risks in the hope of creating a profitable enterprise.
career_growth: High Impact (Building startups, scaling operations, potential to become a founder/CEO)

title: Data Scientist
description: Builds predictive models, experiments with data, and turns raw information into business insights.
career_growth: Exponential (Strong growth in analytics, AI, product, and research teams)

title: Data Engineer
description: Designs reliable data pipelines, storage systems, and analytics infrastructure for large-scale teams.
career_growth: High (Growing demand across product, fintech, and enterprise data teams)

title: Web Developer
description: Builds responsive websites and web applications using modern front-end and back-end tools.
career_growth: High (Strong entry point into product development and full-stack engineering)

title: Back End Developer
description: Builds server-side logic, APIs, and database systems that power web and mobile products.
career_growth: High (Pathway to senior backend engineer and platform architect roles)

title: Java Developer
description: Develops enterprise applications, services, and backend systems using the Java ecosystem.
career_growth: High (Large demand in enterprise software and backend services)

title: Cloud Engineer
description: Deploys and manages cloud infrastructure, automation, and scalable production systems.
career_growth: High (Critical role for cloud migration, platform engineering, and DevOps)

title: Cyber Security Analyst
description: Protects systems and data by monitoring threats, responding to incidents, and improving defenses.
career_growth: High (Increasing demand across enterprise security and compliance teams)

title: Civil Engineer
description: Designs, supervises, and maintains infrastructure projects such as roads, buildings, and bridges.
career_growth: Steady (Growth through site leadership, planning, and infrastructure consulting)

title: Mechanical Engineer
description: Designs, tests, and improves mechanical systems, machines, and manufacturing processes.
career_growth: Steady (Strong opportunities in manufacturing, automotive, and product design)

title: Teacher
description: Educates students, designs lesson plans, and supports academic and personal development.
career_growth: Steady (Progression into senior faculty, academic coordinator, and school leadership roles)

title: Sales Executive
description: Drives revenue by identifying prospects, pitching solutions, and building long-term client relationships.
career_growth: High (Path to account manager, sales manager, and business head roles)
